name: parsnip
description: Opt-in, human-paced AI responses with progressive disclosure.

interface.longDescription: An opt-in alpha for pacing large ideas and tasks into parseable snips while preserving orientation, safety, and user control. Model-backed continuations may increase AI usage.
defaultPrompt: Use Parsnip to help me work through this idea.
Use Parsnip to explain this without overwhelming me.
Use Parsnip to turn this project into small next steps.
